book.title: It
book.author: Stephen King
book.summary: A group of children in Derry, Maine confronts a terrifying shape-shifting entity that returns every 27 years.

book.title: The Housemaid
book.author: Freida McFadden
book.summary: A woman takes a job as a housemaid for a wealthy family, only to uncover dark secrets hidden within the house.

book.title: The Inmate
book.author: Freida McFadden
book.summary: A nurse working in a prison discovers that one of the inmates is someone from her past, leading to shocking revelations.

book.title: Red Queen
book.author: Victoria Aveyard
book.summary: In a divided world where blood determines status, a common girl discovers she has powers reserved for the elite.

book.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
book.author: Harper Lee
book.summary: A young girl in the American South witnesses her father defend a Black man falsely accused of a crime, exposing deep racial injustice.

book.title: Children of Blood and Bone
book.author: Tomi Adeyemi
book.summary: A young girl embarks on a journey to restore magic in a land where it has been lost.

book.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.summary: A young wizard discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

book.title: Hurricane Wars
book.author: Thea Guazon
book.summary: A high-stakes adventure in a world torn apart by elemental storms.

book.title: Percy Jackson and the Lightning Thief
book.author: Rick Riordan
book.summary: A boy discovers he is the son of Poseidon and must stop a war among the gods.

book.title: The Troubled Girls of Drago Mirror Academy
book.author: Unknown
book.summary: A magical academy for troubled girls hides secrets darker than its enchanted walls.

book.title: Batman
book.author: Andrew King
book.summary: A magical academy for troubled girls hides secrets darker than its enchanted walls.

book.title: Black Panther
book.author: Marcus Steele
book.summary: The king of Wakanda faces challenges that test both his heart and his crown.

book.title: Storm
book.author: Lydia Moore
book.summary: A weather-controlling mutant must learn to master her powers to save her friends.

book.title: Supergirl
book.author: David Harper
book.summary: Fighting for justice on Earth, she discovers what it really means to be a hero.

book.title: Wonder Woman
book.author: Clara Jennings
book.summary: The Amazon princess battles gods and mortals alike while defending truth and peace.

book.title: X-Men
book.author: Steven Brooks
book.summary: A team of mutants fights for a world that fears and hates them, balancing heroism and conflict.

book.title: Attack on Titan
book.author: Hajime Isayama
book.summary: Humanity fights for survival against giant humanoid Titans that threaten to wipe out civilization.

book.title: The summer Hikaru died
book.author: Kazuki Tanaka
book.summary: A gripping story of loss and redemption as the protagonist Hokaru faces life-and-death challenges.

book.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
book.author: Gege Akutami
book.summary: A high-stakes supernatural battle where sorcerers fight curses to protect the innocent.

book.title: Naruto
book.author: Masashi Kishimoto
book.summary: The journey of a young ninja striving to gain recognition and protect his village while chasing his dream.

book.title: Spy x Family
book.author: Tatsuya Endo
book.summary: A master spy builds a fake family to complete a secret mission, but unexpected bonds form along the way.

book.title: Will
book.author: Will Smith
book.summary: Will Smith shares his journey from a challenging childhood to global superstardom, exploring lessons in resilience, discipline, and self-belief.

book.title: Finding Me
book.author: Viola Davis
book.summary: Viola Davis opens up about her rise from poverty and abuse to becoming an acclaimed actress, sharing her personal struggles and triumphs.

book.title: A Promised Land
book.author: Barack Obama
book.summary: Barack Obama recounts his early political career and presidency, offering a detailed and reflective account of the challenges, decisions, and hope that shaped his time in office.

book.title: Finding My Way
book.author: Malala Yousafzai
book.summary: Malala Yousafzai shares her personal journey of courage, resilience, and advocacy for girls’ education in Pakistan and around the world.

book.title: Bassie: My Journey of Hope
book.author: Basetsana Kumalo
book.summary: Basetsana Kumalo recounts her inspiring journey from beauty queen to successful entrepreneur and philanthropist, sharing lessons of perseverance, hope, and giving back.

book.title: The Lost in the Never Wood
book.author: Cat Winters
book.summary: A mysterious adventure through a magical forest where lost children must confront the shadows of their past to find their way home.
book.image: images/Sci-fi/27 New Young Adult Sci-Fi_Fantasy Books To Get Your Hands On This Spring.jpeg

book.title: Frankenstein
book.author: Mary Shelley
book.summary: Dr. Victor Frankenstein defies nature and creates life, only to face the terrifying consequences of playing god in a world unprepared for his creation.

book.title: The Alchemist
book.author: Paulo Coelho
book.summary: A young shepherd embarks on a journey across deserts and dreams to discover his personal legend and the true meaning of life.
book.image: images/Sci-fi/The Alchemist cover design by Jim Tierney; art….jpeg

book.author: George Orwell
book.summary: In a totalitarian future, Winston Smith struggles to retain his individuality and freedom under the watchful eye of Big Brother.
book.image: images/Sci-fi/40 best books to read before you die.jpeg

book.title: The Walking That Kills
book.author: H. G. Black
book.summary: In a post-apocalyptic world, survivors must navigate a city overrun by zombie-like creatures, testing their courage, loyalty, and humanity.
book.image: images/Sci-fi/colour pages _ colour pencil _ drawing _ books aesthetic.jpeg
